SourceText: 📺 It must be exhausting to always tell @fields.child_nickname to turn off or put away the phone or tablet.
text: 📺 Inokuba kuyadinisa ukuhlala uxelela u@fields.child_nickname ukuba acime okanye ayibeke ecaleni ifowuni okanye ithebhulethi.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 📝 Set rules with @fields.child_nickname. Tell them that they cannot be on the phone/tablet when you are busy. Your busy time is your child’s quiet play time with toys or reading time with books.
text: 📝 Misela imithetho no@fields.child_nickname. Mxelele ukuba akanakuba sefowunini/kwithebhulethi xa uxakekile. Ixesha lakho elixakekileyo lixesha lokudlala elizolileyo lomntwana wakho ngeethoyi okanye ixesha lokufunda ngeencwadi.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 🌷 Tell your child that telling you what they watch on T.V. or what they do on the phone or tablet is a rule.
text: 🌷 Xelela umntwana wakho ukuba ukukuxelela into ayibukelayo kumabonakude okanye into ayenzayo efowunini okanye kwithebhulethi ngumthetho.

SourceText: 👂 Be patient and kind while listening to them. Manage your anger if you find that they did something wrong online. Take a deep breath.
text: 👂 Yiba nomonde nobubele xa umphulaphule. Lawula umsindo wakho ukuba ufumanisa ukuba wenze into engalunganga kwi-intanethi. Thatha umphefumlo onzulu.

SourceText: 💛 Praise @fields.child_nickname when they follow the rules!
text: 💛 Mncome u@fields.child_nickname xa elandela imithetho!
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 📺 It must be exhausting to always tell your child to turn off or put away the phone or tablet.
text: 📺 Inokuba kuyadinisa ukuhlala uxelela umntwana wakho ukuba acime okanye ayibeke ecaleni ifowuni okanye ithebhulethi.

SourceText: 📝 Set rules with your child. Tell them that they cannot be on the phone/tablet when you are busy. Your busy time is your child’s quiet play time with toys or reading time with books.
text: 📝 Misela imithetho nomntwabna wakho. Mxelele ukuba akanakuba sefowunini/kwithebhulethi xa uxakekile. Ixesha lakho elixakekileyo lixesha lokudlala elizolileyo lomntwana wakho ngeethoyi okanye ixesha lokufunda ngeencwadi.

SourceText: 💛 Praise your child when they follow the rules!
text: 💛 Mncome umntwana wakho xa elandela imithetho!

SourceText: 👂 That’s alright. Even adults don’t agree on this sometimes. Even when we disagree, listening to our children helps us understand their thinking.
text: 👂 Oko kulungile. Nabantu abadala abavumi ngale nto ngamanye amaxesha. Kwanaxa singavumelani, ukuphulaphula abantwana bethu kusinceda siqonde indlela abacinga ngayo.

SourceText: ⏰ Find time to talk about safe and unsafe areas again.
text: ⏰ Fumana ixesha lokuthetha ngeendawo ezikhuselekileyo nezingakhuselekanga kwakhona.

SourceText: 📝 Tell your child that you appreciate their opinions and you are proud of them for being honest about how they feel.
text: 📝 Xelela umntwana wakho ukuba uyazixabisa izimvo zakhe kwaye uyazingca ngaye ngokunyaniseka malunga nendlela aziva ngayo.

SourceText: 😔 It is shocking to learn that people who we trust may make our children uncomfortable.
text: 😔 Kuyothusa ukufunda ukuba abantu esibathembileyo banokwenza abantwana bethu bangakhululeki.

SourceText: 👂 Listen to @fields.child_nickname if they want to talk about why it seems dangerous or uncomfortable. Ask if it’s the place, a particular person, or both that makes them uncomfortable.
text: 👂 Mamela u@fields.child_nickname ukuba ufuna ukuthetha malunga nokuba kutheni kubonakala kuyingozi okanye engakhululeki. Buza ukuba yindawo, umntu othile, okanye zombini ezibangela ukuba angakhululeki.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 🔔Talk with someone and get support. Type {HELP} if you need more assistance.
text: 🔔Thetha nomntu kwaye ufumane inkxaso. Cofa {HELP} ukuba ufuna uncedo oluninzi.

SourceText: 👂 Listen to your child if they want to talk about why it seems dangerous or uncomfortable. Ask if it’s the place, a particular person, or both that makes them uncomfortable.
text: 👂 Mamela umntwana wakho ukuba uyafuna ukuthetha malunga nokuba kutheni kubonakala kuyingozi okanye engakhululeki. Buza ukuba yindawo, umntu othile, okanye zombini ezibangela ukuba angakhululeki.

SourceText: 💡 Ensure that emergency phone numbers are prominently displayed in your house and easily accessible to everyone.
text: 💡 Qinisekisa ukuba iinombolo zefowuni zikaxakeka ziboniswa ngokubonakalayo endlini yakho kwaye zifikeleleka lula kuye wonke umntu.

SourceText: 🔵 Involve your whole family, other caregivers, and friends in your mapping activity. If everyone knows the safe places, they can help keep your child safe!
text: 🔵 Bandakanya usapho lwakho lonke, abanye abanonopheli, kunye nabahlobo kumsebenzi wakho wokwenza imephu. Ukuba wonke umntu uyazazi iindawo ezikhuselekileyo, banokunceda ukugcina umntwana wakho ekhuselekile!
